init.title: LLM Sandbox options
init.description: Adjust code execution limits for this assistant.

data_description.execution_timeout_seconds: Lower values respond faster but may cut off complex requests. Higher values allow more involved requests at the cost of longer waits.
data_description.helper_call_budget: How many service calls a single request may propose. Higher values allow more complex multi-step reasoning but take longer.
